items.original_title: Nobel laureates and AI leaders warn the window to prepare for AI's economic impact is closing fast
items.title_en: Nobel laureates and AI leaders warn the window to prepare for AI's economic impact is closing fast
items.summary_en: More than 200 economists and AI researchers, including 16 Nobel laureates and representatives from Google, OpenAI, and Anthropic, are calling for immediate action in a coordinated statement. The AI transformation could surpass the Industrial Revolution but unfold in a fraction of the time. The paper doesn't propose co…
items.title_zh: 诺贝尔奖得主与AI领军者警告AI的经济影响准备窗口即将关闭
items.summary_zh: 超过200位经济学家和AI研究人员，包括16位诺贝尔奖得主，警告称为AI经济影响做好准备的窗口正在迅速关闭。

items.original_title: The wildest allegations in Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI
items.title_en: The wildest allegations in Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI
items.summary_en: Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI contains allegations that range from employees joking about unauthorized access to Apple’s systems to claims that job candidates were asked to bring Apple hardware to interviews. Here are the complaint’s most eye-catching claims.
items.title_zh: 苹果对OpenAI的商业秘密诉讼中的疯狂指控
items.summary_zh: 苹果公司对OpenAI提起的商业机密诉讼中，涉及了多项惊人指控，包括员工开玩笑关于未授权访问苹果系统的情况。

items.original_title: Anthropic starts localizing Claude pricing for India, its biggest market after the US
items.title_en: Anthropic starts localizing Claude pricing for India, its biggest market after the US
items.summary_en: Claude users in India are starting to see Indian rupee-denominated subscription plans.
items.title_zh: Anthropic开始在印度本地化Claude定价
items.summary_zh: Anthropic开始为其在印度的Claude用户推出以印度卢比计价的订阅计划，印度成为其在美国之外的最大市场。

items.original_title: Nadella calls out AI labs like OpenAI and Anthropic for banning distillation while training on everyone else's data
items.title_en: Nadella calls out AI labs like OpenAI and Anthropic for banning distillation while training on everyone else's data
items.summary_en: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella is calling out OpenAI and Anthropic for what he calls a "reverse information paradox." They train on public data under fair use but ban distillation of their own models, all while learning from customer interactions. Nadella wants companies to control their own learning infrastructure. Micr…
items.title_zh: 纳德拉批评OpenAI和Anthropic在训练数据问题上的做法
items.summary_zh: 微软首席执行官萨提亚·纳德拉对OpenAI和Anthropic提出的质疑，呼吁这些公司控制自己的学习基础设施。

items.original_title: Sam Altman’s space data center trash talk is what most experts already believe
items.title_en: Sam Altman’s space data center trash talk is what most experts already believe
items.summary_en: Responding to Musk accusing him of being a scammer, Altman said, "homeboy you're the one sellling [sic] public market investors on short-term space datacenters."
items.title_zh: OpenAI发布新的提示指南，鼓励用户从结果出发
items.summary_zh: OpenAI发布了一份新的提示指南，建议用户从结果出发，提供更直观的提示方式。

items.original_title: German AI consortium releases Soofi S, an open 30B model that tops benchmarks in both English and German
items.title_en: German AI consortium releases Soofi S, an open 30B model that tops benchmarks in both English and German
items.summary_en: A German research consortium has released Soofi S 30B-A3B, an open language model trained entirely on Deutsche Telekom's cloud infrastructure in Munich. The model uses an efficient hybrid architecture that activates only a fraction of its 31.6 billion parameters per token, keeping throughput steady even at very long c…
items.title_zh: 德国AI联盟发布开源Soofi S语言模型
items.summary_zh: 德国研究联盟发布了Soofi S，一个开放的30B语言模型，在英语和德语基准测试中表现优异。

items.original_title: Waze adds new AI-powered features and customization updates
items.title_en: Waze adds new AI-powered features and customization updates
items.summary_en: Some of the new features are powered by Google's Gemini AI assistant, which reflects the tech giant's broader push to integrate Gemini across its products while also better positioning Waze to compete with rival services such as Apple Maps.
items.title_zh: Waze新增AI驱动的功能与定制更新
items.summary_zh: Waze新增了由Google的Gemini AI助手驱动的AI功能，旨在增强用户体验并与其他服务竞争。

items.original_title: Hermes agent maker Nous Research in talks for new funding at $1.5B valuation
items.title_en: Hermes agent maker Nous Research in talks for new funding at $1.5B valuation
items.summary_en: The company is raising at least $75 million, led by Robot Ventures, with significant participation from USV and other prominent investors.
items.title_zh: Hermes代理制造商Nous Research洽谈融资，估值达15亿美元
items.summary_zh: Nous Research正在与Robot Ventures等投资者洽谈融资，预计估值达到15亿美元，筹集至少7500万美元。
